title: Useful Anvil
description: An opinionated mod that "fixes" the uselessness of the anvil at repairing items.
body:
# Useful Anvil
An opinionated mod that makes tools no longer last forever.

### Features
 - Anvils can now use levels beyond 39, a feature that is already in other mods, but I challenged myself to recreate it. This is so that, if so wished, a tool can be repaired many more times than the base game would allow, at the exponential XP cost that the base game already employs.
 - The Mending enchantment now only fully repairs an item three times. The efficacy of mending decreases until it no longer repairs the item. For example, you have a Netherite sword, which has a durability of 2031. After mending 6063 durability, which mends slower as the efficacy decreases, Mending no longer has any effect.
 - Repairing a tool with materials is now required to prolong the life of the tool.
 - Display the current efficacy of mending in the tooltip.
